judge.reason: The primary purpose of _sctp_make_chunk is to allocate and initialize an SCTP chunk (skb, chunk header, authentication flag). The refcount management (via sctp_chunkify and error-path kfree_skb) is incidental to the creation logic, not the main purpose.
